ticket.title: Backend hardening: API timeouts, security headers, env safety, CSP monitoring
ticket.description: A post-CSP-fix audit found backend hardening gaps: API timeouts, security headers, env safety, an auth guard, and CSP monitoring. Fix before UAT sign-off; reference CONVENTIONS.md.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the CSP incident this hardens after

code_agent.rationale: code_agent keeps the in-scope codebase/decision/ticket context; workspace is out of scope, stale entries are withheld, local notes are private; 'PM Security Audit ' is in scope but tangential here (optional).

human_teammate.rationale: Robin (the baseline owner) sees the current team entries; another actor's local note stays on its owner's device.
